productDisplayName: Catwalk Women Gun Metal Grey Flats
description: Get dressed in these t-strap sandals from catwalk for a feminine look. The woven straps lend a dose of chic to your look, making this pair a must have in your wardrobe. Upper Woven leather uppers in a t-strap style for extra comfort Elongated bead on the front for extra style Leather band behind the ankle for a snug Fit Leather lining on the ankle strap for added comfort Midsole Wooden footbed for durability and style Outsole TPU outsole in a flexible design for greater flexibility of the feet Brand name alphabet grooves on the forefoot and flower shaped heel for extra grip shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
